mapper.insert: INSERT INTO acd_jly_site (usercode, longitude, latitude, reporttime) VALUES (#{usercode}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{reportTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE acd_jly_site SET usercode = #{usercode}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, reporttime = #{reportTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, usercode, longitude, latitude, reporttime FROM acd_jly_site WHERE usercode = #{usercode} ORDER BY reporttime DESC

SELECT a.id, a.usercode, a.longitude, a.latitude, a.reporttime, b.username,b.groups,b.groupscode, b.ck_wcl ckl, b.ds_wcl dsl, (b.ck_wcl+b.ds_wcl) hj FROM acd_jly_site a LEFT JOIN acd_dangri_gzl_ry b ON a.usercode = b.usercode WHERE date(a.reporttime) = #{dateStr} AND date(b.tjtime) = #{dateStr} AND (a.usercode, a.reporttime) IN (SELECT usercode, MAX(reporttime) FROM acd_jly_site WHERE date(reporttime) = #{dateStr} GROUP BY usercode)
AND b.groupscode = #{groupscode}
AND ( b.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.usercode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND groupscode is not null

SELECT a.id, a.usercode, a.longitude, a.latitude, a.reporttime, b.username,b.groups,b.groupscode, b.ck_wcl ckl, b.ds_wcl dsl, (b.ck_wcl+b.ds_wcl) hj FROM acd_jly_site a LEFT JOIN acd_dangri_gzl_ry b ON a.usercode = b.usercode WHERE a.usercode = #{usercode} AND date(a.reporttime) = #{dateStr} AND groupscode is not null ORDER BY a.reporttime ASC
SELECT id, usercode, longitude, latitude, reporttime FROM acd_jly_site WHERE date(reporttime) = #{dateStr} ORDER BY reporttime ASC
SELECT id, usercode, longitude, latitude, reporttime FROM acd_jly_site ORDER BY reporttime DESC
